title: citrus mangshanensis
intro: Citrus mangshanensis, also known as the Mangshan orange, is a species of evergreen shrub or small tree in the family Rutaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels due to its high content of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Citrus mangshanensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antioxidant, making it a valuable addition to traditional Chinese medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of decoctions, teas, or capsules, and its extracts are also used in modern pharmaceuticals and food supplements.
